extortion.description: www.cpa.co.il https://www.zoominfo.com/c/shtainmetz-aminoach--co/447493108 Shtainmetz Aminoach is a leading accounting firm in Israel with 38 years of experience, located in Tel Aviv, and recognized among the top firms in the country. The firm specializes in a wide range of accounting services, including tax planning, international taxation, and financial consulting, catering to large and sophisticated corporations. With a team of experts, including former tax authority officials, they provide tailored solutions for various sectors such as high-tech, real estate, and e-commerce. Additionally, they are part of the global UHY network, enhancing their international service capabilities.
